switch.title: 阻止快取功能
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_stop_cache=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_stop_cache=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_stop_cache=0/clearbox_stop_cache=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" if ! pgrep "StopCached" >/dev/null 2>&1; then "$home_dir/$core" "--daemon-stop-cache" fi echo " » 已開啟 ~" else sed -i 's/clearbox_stop_cache=1/clearbox_stop_cache=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » 已關閉，重啟生效 ~" fi

switch.title: 阻止所有軟體更新 / 安裝
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_stop_install=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_stop_install=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then "$home_dir/$core" "--app-allow-install" STOP else "$home_dir/$core" "--app-allow-install" RESET fi
